race.description: Racing Anzac Day Weekend Mon 27 Apr Hcp (C3)
race.comment: The elite Williams barn has a strong hand. HOUSEWIFE (2) improved sharply over 1400m at Belmont, second-up, finding Rally The Troops 3L too good, but covering the others. Comes back plenty in grade with a handy 2kg claim.  Proven third-up, and she has more to give. Goes one better with average luck. Stablemate THINK PINK DAZE (8) ran a strong number, winning a CL1 at Northam before the spell. Was well supported here first up this level, but looked a run short. She was an easy Ascot winner at her only second-up outing, but as with the above, draws awkwardly and needs a good ride. JUST LEROY (4) has been racing in better class in town, and three back was beaten a whisker at Ascot over this distance. Switches back to 1400m and will position forward from an inside barrier. Keep safe. MAXWHOOSHTAPIN (1) resumes and is a betting watch. He will race over further, but is Stakes-placed and has raced well fresh and over this distance. Comes back in grade with a handy 3kg claim.
